translation.paragraph: These sentences are all taken from Malay newspapers such as Utusan Malaysia and Berita Harian and also online news services Malaysiakini and Bernama this year (2025). I have done something similar in 2011. (It's here). If you don't agree with my translation, it's ok. It is possible to translate the same text differently. I don't claim that my translation is the best. - pgoh13 (19/02/2025)

sentence.malay: Sejumlah lima juta murid memulakan sesi persekohan baharu semalam dan hari ini di seluruh negara.
sentence.english: A total of five million pupils began the new academic session yesterday and today throughout the country.

sentence.malay: Sekolah sesi petang yang mempunyai murid dan guru beragama Islam akan menamatkan sesi persekolahan seawal pukul 5.30 petang.
sentence.english: Afternoon session schools having Muslim pupils and teachers will end their school session as early as 5.30 in the evening.

sentence.malay: Bahasa Melayu, sebagai satu daripada bahasa terbesar di Asia Tenggara, memainkan peranan penting dalam membentuk identiti dan budaya serantau.
sentence.english: The Malay language, as one of the largest languages ​​in Southeast Asia, plays an important role in shaping the identity and culture of the region.

sentence.malay: testBahasa Melayu, sebagai satu daripada bahasa terbesar di Asia Tenggara, memainkan peranan penting dalam membentuk identiti dan budaya serantau.
sentence.english: testThe Malay language, as one of the largest languages ​​in Southeast Asia, plays an important role in shaping the identity and culture of the region.

sentence.malay: test2Bahasa Melayu, sebagai satu daripada bahasa terbesar di Asia Tenggara, memainkan peranan penting dalam membentuk identiti dan budaya serantau.
sentence.english: test2The Malay language, as one of the largest languages ​​in Southeast Asia, plays an important role in shaping the identity and culture of the region.
